audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 393-396 directly implement the invariant: read the full `s_assetOut` balance and transfer it to `s_assetOutReceiver` if non-zero. The fee-aggregator branch (lines 387-391) operates on `asset`, which is structurally guaranteed to differ from `s_assetOut` (auction start logic at line 350 never sets `s_auctionStarts` for `s_assetOut`, so it can never appear in `endedAuctions`). `s_assetOutReceiver` is enforced non-zero by `_setAssetOutReceiver`.
